news_items.headline: Astros trade playoff hero Lance McCullers Jr. to Brewers in salary dump
news_items.summary: Lance McCullers won two titles with Astros, but injuries kept his career from taking off.

news_items.headline: Brewers trade for McCullers, Gordon from Astros to bolster pitching depth (source)
Rays' Junior Caminero feels fortunate his left hand is not broken after he was hit in the All-Star Game
news_items.summary: Junior Caminero feared the worst when a 98 mph sinker that didn’t sink struck him in the left hand during the All-Star Game.

news_items.headline: All in the family: Cody Bellinger wins All-Star MVP as his dad, former big leaguer Clay, looks on
news_items.summary: Cody Bellinger had a night for the ages.

news_items.headline: Reports: White Sox give No. 1 pick Roch Cholowsky record-setting bonus
news_items.summary: UCLA shortstop Roch Cholowsky has reportedly agreed to a contract with the Chicago White Sox that will pay him a record $10.35 million signing bonus.

news_items.headline: Braves Biweekly: Fake it and maybe make it?
news_items.summary: .500 ball is better than June, but the Braves got kinda lucky to play .500 ball…

news_items.headline: Yankees Birthday of the Day: Bubbles Hargrave
news_items.summary: The catcher played just one year in New York, but had an interesting journey before that.

news_items.headline: Weekly Pebble Report: A first half recap
news_items.summary: From Charlie Condon's assault on the PCL to a 19-year-old tearing up the Arizona Complex League, a level-by-level look at where all five Rockies affiliates stand at the All-Star break — and the one player at each stop you need to know.

news_items.headline: Tigers' Justin Verlander pumps up American League in his final All-Star Game
news_items.summary: The 43-year-old was one of the few All-Stars to receive a warm ovation in Philadelphia from a crowd that reveled in jeering just about any player who was not in a Phillies uniform.
